headlines.title: SpaceX tops Amazon in market value as retail investors race to buy shares
headlines.description: SpaceX shares continue to soar, gaining another 10% early in the day as buyer interest in Elon Musk’s largest company showed no sign of slowing down.

headlines.title: U.K. social media ban stokes fears of government surveillance
headlines.description: A sweeping social media ban for kids under 16 in the United Kingdom is drawing concern from privacy advocates who say such measures will chill free speech online

headlines.title: On Uber and Lyft, different prices for the same ride raise questions about fares
headlines.description: A Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft riders often see different prices even when they request rides at the same time on the same route.

headlines.title: Britain unveils sweeping ban on social media for under-16s
headlines.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced a sweeping ban on social media use for those under 16, joining other countries around the world seeking to protect children online.

headlines.title: Anthropic suspends new AI models after government directive
headlines.description: The U.S. government instructed Anthropic to prevent any foreign national from accessing the AI company’s latest and most powerful models Friday evening, according to the AI giant

headlines.title: SpaceX stock gains 19% its first trading day, closing out a historic IPO
headlines.description: SpaceX, the largest IPO to ever hit the public market, began trading and soared 30%, making Elon Musk the world’s first trillionaire.

headlines.title: SpaceX locks in IPO price of $135, making it largest stock debut ever
headlines.description: The company controlled by Elon Musk will begin trading Friday at a valuation of $1.77 trillion.

headlines.title: Kylian Mbappé anota un GOLAZO tras un gran pase de Michael Olise
headlines.description: Francia no encontraba la forma de romper el empate ante un combativo Senegal, hasta que sus estrellas se asociaron en una brillante jugada para firmar el 1-0.

headlines.title: Pride and protest in ‘Tehrangeles’: A divided diaspora watches Iran at the World Cup
headlines.description: Iran national team fans watched the 2-2- draw with New Zealand at the World Cup in Los Angeles, many holding the lion and sun flag in protest at the Islamic Republic.

headlines.title: From The Sports Desk: Four World Cup games, four tightly contested draws on Monday
headlines.description: The last time four World Cup matches on the same day ended in a tie, Pelé was the 17-year-old breakout star and Frenchman Just Fontaine went on to score a tournament-record 13 goals.

headlines.title: Eight rules made Norway a winter sports superpower. Will they help at the World Cup?
headlines.description: The country’s unique approach to youth athletics has turned it into a winter sports powerhouse. Yet no sport is as popular as soccer.

headlines.title: New Study Sparks Questions Over Uber and Lyft's Ride Pricing
headlines.description: A new Consumer Reports investigation finds Uber and Lyft customers are often given different fares when they book the same rides at the same time. While Uber and Lyft have long used surge pricing, the new findings are raising questions about whether the apps are using personalized or surveillance pricing based on customers’ personal data. NBC’s Vicky Nguyen reports for TODAY.
